== Notes for [[Item:Q80898|Q80898]] ==

ID: I86642

Name: Basina Severus

Given Name: Basina

Surname: Severus

Sex: F

_UID: C3782DCEB0828545ABF53411B1B46EA48E91

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Birth: 183

Death: deceased

Father: Lucius Septimus Severus b: 11 APR 146

Mother: Julia Domna b: ABT 167

Marriage 1 Claudius Appelinius b: ABT 160

Married:

Children

Claudia Appelinius b: ABT 200

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86642
--------------------
•ID: I23885 •Name: Bassina of Rome •Sex: F •Birth: ABT 183 •Death: UNKNOWN

Father: Septimus Severus Emperor Of Rome b: 11 APR 145 in Leptus Magna, Tripoliania, North Africa
Mother: Julia Domna b: 167

Marriage 1 Claudius Apellinus b: ABT 160 Children 1. Claudia Apellina b: ABT 200

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=john_d_newport&id=I23885

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
